trigger_when: The user explicitly asks for precise, parallel, global, or comprehensive research
A subsystem upgrade is blocked by missing external knowledge

explicit_trigger_phrases.standard: 启动精准并行研究协议
explicit_trigger_phrases.gap_focused: 围绕当前最大差距做去重并行搜索
explicit_trigger_phrases.feature_focused: 针对这个功能做精准并行参考全网信息
explicit_trigger_phrases.anti_drift: 如果你判断当前升级可能流于形式，立即启动研究协议
explicit_trigger_phrases.research_first: 先按研究协议补足参考，再开始实现
explicit_trigger_phrases.dedup_focused: 按去重机制并行搜索，不要重复已有资料
explicit_trigger_phrases.landing_focused: 只收集能直接指导项目落地实现的资料
explicit_trigger_phrases.soft_trigger: 优先启用精准并行研究协议
explicit_trigger_phrases.hard_trigger: 本轮禁止直接开做，必须先启动精准并行研究协议
explicit_trigger_phrases.deep_reading: 这篇论文/这个仓库是指路明灯，认真研读每一个细节
explicit_trigger_phrases.full_standard_command: 启动精准并行研究协议：围绕当前差距做去重并行搜索，只保留能直接指导 MarioTrickster-MathArt 落地升级的高价值资料。

research_trigger_policy.deep_reading_trigger_rule: When the user names a specific paper, repo, or documentation as the primary reference (e.g., 'this paper is your guiding light'), MUST switch from parallel scanning to Deep Reading Protocol. Parallel discovery finds WHAT to build; Deep Reading finds HOW to build it. Never skip Deep Reading for North Star sources.
research_trigger_policy.phrase_interpretation_rule: Close paraphrases should count as valid triggers when the intent is clearly precise, parallel, dedup-aware, implementation-relevant research.
stop_when: Two or more strong sources support the same practical conclusion
New results are mostly duplicates or weaker restatements
The next code change is already clear
The bottleneck is engineering rather than missing knowledge

completed_tasks.title: WFC locked-tile absolute survival and explicit conflict closure
